'''Vareesa Enan''' was a naïve [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] tourist who traveled to [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] in the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Vareesa was the cousin of [[Vanster Enan]], who ran a [[Vanster Enan's Sop House|sop house]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. On Ralltiir, Vareesa was befriended by fellow Ithorian [[Kikow]] and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Furellas]], though both apparently had ulterior motives. Furellas bought a [[Ralltiir tiger]] kitten for Vareesa and helped [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] him offworld. Vareesa named the kitten "Little Kikow", unaware that he would grow up to be bloodthirsty and unmanageable.
